summary: Align novel-feature descriptions across all generated surfaces (root.go --help Highlights, which.go, mcp/tools.go, README, SKILL, manifest) with the corrected source.
reason: A Phase 4.95 review corrected creator-find platform count (12 probed, not 28 total), removed 'posting cadence' from creator-compare (not computed), corrected account-budget (no local command log; uses API credit balance + daily usage), and 'rising fastest' -> 'biggest' for trends triangulate (static snapshot, not velocity). A later generate --force reverted README/SKILL from stale research.json; research.json was corrected at source and the generated surfaces aligned here pending the next regen.
validated_outcome: go build ./... passes; no live surface retains 'posting cadence', 'rising fastest', 'local command log', 'which of 28 platforms', or 'every synced platform'.
